subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise be to God that thou art possessed of a radiant countenance, a comely form, and an exalted nature [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد خدا را که با رخی تابان و هیکلی خوش اندام و فطرتی بلند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
